miscTables.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '5USA000082' and Contract  = ''
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-save' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode = 'CHGBACK'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID,'Amt6610004t' as Flex1,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6610004')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Amt1) (select KeyID,'Amt6610004a' as Flex1,round(Amt1*0.125,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Flex1 = 'Amt6610004t')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Amt1) (select KeyID,'Amt6610004b' as Flex1,round(Amt1*0.0625,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Flex1 = 'Amt6610004t')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID,'AmtOtherTot' as Flex1,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL <> '6610004')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID,'AmtOther' as Flex1,round(sum(round(Amt1*0.2,2)),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL <> '6610004' and CC = '5USA000062')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Flex1) (select x.KeyID,x.GL,'5USA000082' as CC,y.Field1 + ' IT WG FFX [Yr]/[Mo] from ' + x.CC + ' ' + x.GL as Txt,y.Field1 as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,round(-x.Amt1*cast(y.Field2 as float),2) as Amt1,'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX x, Misc_Tables y where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Table_ID = 'Reimburse' and y.ID = 'G73-TP-6610004' and x.GL = '6610004' and x.CC = '5USA000062')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Flex1) (select x.KeyID,x.GL,'5USA000082' as CC,y.Field1 + ' IT WG FFX [Yr]/[Mo] from ' + x.CC as Txt,y.Field1 as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,round(-x.Amt1*cast(y.Field2 as float),2) as Amt1,'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX x, Misc_Tables y where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Table_ID = 'Reimburse' and y.ID = 'G73-TP-GL' and not x.GL = '6610004' and x.CC = '5USA000062')
Update x set x.GL = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on x.GL = y.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Reimburse' and ID = 'GL'
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]', Txt = Contract + ' IT WG FFX [Yr]/[Mo] from 5USA000062', Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2), Flex1 = 'pass1' where KeyID = '[batchID]-save'

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Flex1) (select KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass1' group by KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Flex1 = 'pass1' or Flex1 is null)

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,PC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Amt1) (select KeyID,'1998900' as GL,'1400000000' as PC,x.Txt,x.Contract,'' as ProdCode,y.Descr as TP,round(-sum(x.Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX x left join Misc_Tables y on x.Contract = y.Field1 where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Table_ID = 'Reimburse' and y.ID = 'G73-TP-6610004' group by x.KeyID,x.Txt,x.Contract,y.Descr)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
